description: Bifolium containing vignettes from Roman history, a bit about Jesus, and also the beginning of an account of a Jewish-Christian debate that took place "here in Avila." The adversary was Diego Martin, formerly Avner, from among the students of the students of Maestro Alfonso.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בעברית. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
